implementation_sequence.queue_policy: Stage 6 executes tickets by execution_queue_position unless parallel batch permits safe concurrent work.

implementation_slices.name: Platform Foundation
implementation_slices.goal: Establish workspace, RBAC, persistence, object storage, queue, audit, and app shell foundations.
implementation_slices.validation_checkpoint: Workspace shell renders and protected routes enforce workspace-scoped access.

implementation_slices.name: Supplier And Import Intake
implementation_slices.goal: Enable supplier setup and import review into normalized assets.
implementation_slices.validation_checkpoint: User can create supplier, upload file, map fields, handle errors, and commit valid products/services.

implementation_slices.name: Asset Library And Commercial Logic
implementation_slices.goal: Enable asset search, cost components, pricing previews, margins, bundles, and recipes.
implementation_slices.validation_checkpoint: User can find assets, preview price/margin, and publish a valid bundle/recipe.

implementation_slices.name: Quote Output
implementation_slices.goal: Enable customer quote drafting, approval, generation, sharing, and async job status.
implementation_slices.validation_checkpoint: User can create a quote from priced offerings, generate an output, and share/revoke a link.

implementation_slices.name: Validation And Release Hardening
implementation_slices.goal: Complete automated validation, accessibility, security, regression, and release readiness.
implementation_slices.validation_checkpoint: Launch-critical E2E, accessibility, RBAC, async recovery, and release gates pass.

sequence_dependencies.reason: Supplier and import flows require workspace, RBAC, database, storage, queue, and shell foundations.
Commercial logic requires committed normalized products/services.
Quotes require customers, valid offerings, price snapshots, and margin states.
Release hardening validates the complete workflow.

validation_checkpoints: CHECKPOINT-003: pricing, margin, and bundle publish

sequence_risks.risk: Frontend screens can be built before API contracts settle.
sequence_risks.mitigation: Use shared API contract stubs and serialize merge until API tests pass.

execution_decisions.decision: Implement import review before pricing and quotes.

stage_6_handoff_notes: Do not start quote output before pricing snapshots are available.
